answer:
We need all \( u \) such that neither \( 2u \) nor \( -20u \) is in \( (-\infty, -1) \).  
That means \( 2u \ge -1 \) and \( -20u \ge -1 \), which gives \( u \ge -\frac{1}{2} \) and \( u \le \frac{1}{20} \).  
Thus the interval is \( \left[ -\frac{1}{2}, \frac{1}{20} \right] \), which matches option D.

\boxed{D}
